positive: A minimalist geometric abstract pattern featuring interlocking stylized mountain peaks and abstract constellations, rendered in clean lines and solid color blocks. The design should be highly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for a screen print on t-shirts. Utilize a restricted color palette of deep midnight blue, burnt orange, and cream. Style should be a modern flat vector illustration combined with subtle distressed texture for depth. Strong contrast, clear silhouettes, and clean composition. Print-friendly, vector graphic style, seamless repeating element potential.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive detail, photorealistic, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
